parsed.explanation: Fixed 2 XML issues: (1) escaped the ampersand in the TITLE text ('&' → '&') to make it well-formed XML; (2) corrected the mismatched closing tag '</PRICE>' to '</PRIZE>' so it matches the opening tag.
